posts.author: nivas_k
posts.text: Claude MCP Server integration error — We’ve verified that Kite MCP is working fine with Claude Desktop on our end. Please try the following steps and check if the issue gets resolved: Uninstall Claude Desktop. Delete all app data (for example, %APPDATA%\Claude on Windows or ~/Library/Application Support/Claude on macOS). Reinstall the latest version of Claude Desktop and test again. If the issue still persists, please raise a support ticket with complete details so we can investigate further and assist you.

posts.author: ARJUN_VARMA
posts.text: Claude MCP Server integration error — Claude MCP was not working today after the new update for the desktop app , anybody faced the issue
